title: ConformanceManifest
description: Top-level shape of conformance.yaml. A YAML document with a single top-level key `entries` holding the list of ConformanceEntry objects.

ConformanceEntry.title: ConformanceEntry
ConformanceEntry.description: One entry in conformance.yaml. Each entry represents one row from the former §Verified Features table in subset.md and binds a tested feature to its subset rule, SWC AST node kinds, test artefacts, and verification status.

id.description: Stable identifier for this entry, unique within conformance.yaml.

subset_rule.description: The inclusion rule (S1–S10), exclusion rule (X1–X12), or boundary category (B1–B3).

ast_node_kinds.description: SWC AST node kind strings (swc_ecma_ast / @swc/types) that trigger the associated subset rule. Required for S1–S10 and X1–X12 entries; omit for boundary entries (B1–B3).

disambiguation_predicate.description: Required when ast_node_kinds overlaps with another rule. Human-readable predicate distinguishing this rule's trigger.

demo_dir.description: Directory name under examples/ that contains the demo app exercising this feature.

test_file.description: File name of the integration test under crates/jet/tests/ covering this feature. May be a comma-separated list.

status.description: verified — end-to-end integration test passes in CI. unit_only — unit test exists but no in-browser integration test. pending — neither demo nor integration test exists; path checks skipped.
